titleStmt.title: SII 17.45: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 45. (A.R. No. 43 of 1904). KUḌATINI, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the platform in front of the Kumārasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1132 Pramōda, Jyēshṭha, śu. 3, Thursday regularly corresponding to 1210 A.D., May 27, the month being Nija-Jyēshṭha.

It records gift of lands, house-sites and an oil mill for a perpetual lamp to the god Nāgēśvara by Vinayanidhi Vishṇukaradēva and the five Vargas and others who had formed an assembly. Among others Sunkaveṅgaḍe Nāgarasa is mentioned as one of the donors.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
There is a floral design engraved.svastiśrī jayābhyudayaścaThere is a floral design engraved.namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāra
vē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrī gārī kucayugma cāruchara sa
ṇa vyālipta vakṣasthalī bhōgaṁ dēvanadīpayaḥ kaṇalasacchēṣākṣatālaṁkṛtaṁ nāgēṁdrōttama kuṁḍa
lāṁgada kaṭēsūtrōpavītāṁkitaṁ nāgēśaṁ padedīge koṭṭi toṇiyayduṁ va¨rggadiṭṭā¨rtthamaṁ . śivabhaktaṁ
gatibhaktanappa manujaṁgatyaṁta sadbhaktanappavanaṁ kāṇaloḍaṁ viriṁci harimukhya¨rkāṇa reṁbīśa
niṁduvalaṁ baṁdananutte kaimugiva nissaṁdēhadiṁ naṁbu vutsa�diṁ pūjisa bhaktakōṭe gabhavaṁ mā
ḷkiṣṭa saṁsiddhiyaṁ . śivaniṁdaṁ peṟatoṁdu daivamadhikaṁ tānuṁṭe sa¨rvvēśanaṁ bhavanaṁ pūjisi kai
gaḷaṁ mugidu muktiśrīge pakkāgadēke vṛthākeṭṭapirēke cōra narakaṁbōkappi[lōkaṁte?] māna
varē poykana sāṟuguṁ ḍamaruga dhvānaṁ bhavāgāradoḷ . bhagapūṣa¨rddha kṣayagñāva sarado
ḷabhavaṁ yagña bhāgā¨rhanalleṁda gajēśāvagñegeyde vaḍadaraṟiyira rudranaṁbaṁdu kāṇiṁ ja
gamellaṁ bhaktiyiṁ kaimugiyimeṟagi mārādhisiṁ vīrabhadrādigaḷiṁ soppāgavēḍeṁ dulivu
dabhava gaṁbhīra bhērīninādaṁ . krūraviṣaṁgaḷaṁ kuḍivaraṁtakanaṁ jaṟiva¨rmmahōgra kāḷōra ganaṁ kaḍaṁgi
piḍiva¨rssiḍilaṁ poḍeva ¨rggajāriyaṁ yārige tappariḷdu śivadūṣakanaṁjavanokki likkuva ¨rvvī
ragaṇaṁgaḷeṁdoḍidirā¨rpramatha¨rgge jagatrayaṁgaḷoḷ . karakamaḷaṁgaḷaṁ muṟidumāpatigē
ṟisi mīṁṭi kaṁṇgaḷaṁ harana śi�grado ḷiṟisi dāṁḍegaruḷgaḷoḷateyaṁ bhayaṁkara menemāḍi śaṁkara
nana¨rccisi paṁdaleyiṁ nivāḷiyaṁ puramathanaṁge koṭṭu maguḷduṁ paḍeva ¨rpramatha¨rka ḷadbhutaṁ .There is a floral design engraved here.
There is a floral design engraved here.svastiśrīmacchakanṛpava¨rṣada 1132 neya pramōda saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭhaśuddha tadige bṛhaspati
vāradaṁdu svasti samadhigata paṁcamahātabda vratajapaniyama hōmāgni yuktaruṁ śrīsvāmi
kā¨rtikēyadēvatapōvanādhiparuṁ śrīmaddaṁḍāsana sukhāsīnarumappa . vinayanidhi
viṣṇukaradēvanu mayduṁva¨rgamuṁ manōmudadiṁdaṁ tanatana geḷkōṭetapōdhanaru masaṁ khyāta bhakta
ruṁ baṇajigaruṁ . mahāsabheyāgi naredi¨rddu . dānakrayaṁgaḷiṁdaṁ śrī nāgēśaṁge baṁda keymanegaḷana
tyānaṁdade barasida raṁbhōnidhi raviśaśigaḷuḷḷinaṁ śāsenadoḷ . śrī nāgēśvaradēva¨rgge dēvaṁboladoḷ
vāmiyakkaṁ koṭṭa bhūmi savaṇbolada sīmeyiṁ paḍuval mattar 7 kaṁ 60 Adaṟa bhuje teṁka 120
ba 131 pa 13 mū 17 . daṭṭavoladoḷdēva¨rggāḍiyiṁ duḷḷa bhūmi kuṟugōḍa dāriyiṁ paḍuva
kāṭimageṟeyiṁ baḷiya bāviyiṁ vāyavyadoḷ maḷakaṁ 170 Adaṟa bhuje mū 14 pa 15
teṁkalu 5 ba 65 karuvanamāḷadoḷ vāsudēvaṁdēva¨rgge koṭṭa bhūmi caṁgabbaya banniyiṁ
mūḍa jaṟigavolada dāriyiṁ teṁkal ma 11 kaṁ 67 Adaṟa bhuje ba 49 teṁ pa 58
māḷadoḷu dēyaṇa nāyakaṁ dēva¨rgge koṭṭa bhūmi maṇamōcana
17 Ādara bhujepa 30 . mū 33 teṁ 19 ba 19 Eḷtinarāya
baḍagal bhagavati

There is a floral design engraved here.manasaṁtōsaṁ vanasinoḷ suṁkaveggaḍe nāgarasaṁ dēva¨rgge koṭṭa bhūmi seṭṭiya kaṟeya dāriyiṁ
mūḍalmattaraṁṭukaṁ mattara bhaje ba 29 teṁ 28 mū 70 pa 70 Ajja kāḍi voladoḷ huḷiyama
yyaṁ dēva¨rgge koṭṭabhūmi sū¨ryyadēvara keyyiṁ baḍagal 3 kaṁ 1 dara bhuje mo 19 pa 19 . ba 37 teṁ 3 7
Ālaṁboladoḷ bācayyana maga huṇisayyanaṁ dēva¨rgge dhārege saṁda tōṁṭi Iṭṭageya dāriyiṁ
paḍuval traipuruṣadēvara tōṁṭadiṁA blank space ismattamātaniṁdhāregesaṁdatōṁṭa biḷukuṁṭeya dā
riya teṁkaA blank space is left here.brahmacāri mukhyasthāna dayduva¨rgaṁga ḷdēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gāṇa 1There is a
Digital edition of SII 17.45 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
